title: Two Ledgers Open at Once

mood.label: Uneasy calm 🌥️
mood.summary: A notch below neutral — super typhoon, wildfires, a rising quake toll and a tightening siege on one side; a dissolving Gaza government, a NATO pledge to Ukraine, record markets and quiet medical wins on the other.

style.genre: gospel-soul / afrobeat-tinged organ groove — a sampled Hammond-style organ laying warm G mixolydian gospel chords over a steady swung four-on-the-floor kit with afrobeat shaker and rim work, muted brass stabs answering in the gaps, a plucked electric bass walking under a soft sine sub, and high glockenspiel glints for the quiet wins; mixolydian's lowered seventh (natural F) keeping the warmth honest and just-off-level — a day that tilts a shade toward strain but refuses to fall, two ledgers open at once

sampleSources: Strudel default library (VCSL, drum machines, sampled organ/brass/mallets)
pattern: stack( s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~, ~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~, hh*8, ~ rim ~ rim ~ rim ~ rim").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.62).swingBy(0.12,4).room(0.14), s("shaker*8").gain(perlin.range(0.12,0.3).slow(6)).pan(sine.range(0.35,0.65).slow(5)).hpf(1800), note("<[g3,b3,d4,f4] [c4,e4,g4] [d4,f4,a4] [e4,g4,b4,d4]>").s("organ").attack(0.02).sustain(0.85).release(0.4).gain(0.3).lpf(sine.range(1100,2600).slow(12)).room(0.28).rsize(3), note("g2 ~ d3 g2 ~ c3 d3 ~").s("sawtooth").lpf(520).gain(0.34).attack(0.01).decay(0.18).sustain(0.2), note("g1 ~ ~ ~ c2 ~ ~ ~").s("sine").gain(0.3).lpf(180), note("~ ~ d5 ~ ~ b4 ~ [a4 g4], ~ f4 ~ ~ e4 ~ ~ ~").s("brass").gain(0.24).attack(0.01).release(0.25).lpf(2400).delay(0.28).delaytime(0.27).room(0.2).pan(0.6), note("g5 ~ ~ e5 ~ d5 ~ ~").s("glockenspiel").gain(0.2).delay(0.34).delaytime(0.375).room(0.42).pan(0.4).slow(2) )

lines: The wind's got a name and it's headed for shore,
Rota went dark, and it's coming for more.
The south hills are burning, the smoke won't hold still,
Three thousand names under a Venezuela hill.
Two ledgers open, both hands full at once —
a siege in the dark, and a deal that just begun.
Don't call it good, don't call it gone,
the needle sits at forty-three and the day rolls on.
A government folds so a table can be set,
seventy billion says we're not done yet.
The Dow found a ceiling it hadn't touched before,
and somewhere a trial cracks a door that was closed for sure.
